use_cases: Displaying challenge or feature highlights with title, description, and call-to-action
Creating attention-grabbing feature showcases with hover animations
Building interactive landing page sections with animated CTAs
ai_summary: A customizable challenge or feature card component with hover animations using Framer Motion. Features a solid background color, title, description, and animated arrow button. The card scales up slightly and gains a stronger shadow on hover, with the arrow icon sliding right. Fully customizable via props for title, description, button text, background color, and additional CSS classes.
